description: ipanema sandals draw inspiration from the culture of the Brazilian city of ipanema. The tropical city's street style is reinterpreted in ipanema footwear - bold prints, vibrant colours and quirky embellishments. A brand with a cause, iPanema collaborated with Gisele Bü ndchen for a climate change project and these products represent their commitment to social-change.UpperSlim T-straps with a crystal embellishmentHorizontal forefoot strapSoft footbedAnimal print all over the footbedCurved footbedOutsoleSingle piece PVC moulded, flexible outsoleHorizontal lined groovesSandal careWipe with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust
